summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Ben's Road Service MVP - backend APIs working correctly, frontend loads with all sections visible, admin dashboard functional. Main issue: quote calculator form validation preventing estimate generation due to dropdown selection problems.

ui_bugs.issue: Dropdown selections (Vehicle Type and Service Type) not properly registering, causing form validation to fail
ui_bugs.impact: Users cannot get quote estimates - core functionality blocked

integration_issues.issue: Form validation prevents estimate API call when dropdowns appear unselected

passed_tests: Backend API endpoints all working (6/6 tests passed)
Landing page loads with hero section and sticky header
Language toggle (EN/ES) switches text content correctly
All 7 services display in services section
Why Choose Us section displays correctly
Reviews section displays with review cards
Admin dashboard shows stats and quote requests table
Admin refresh and logout functionality works
Mobile floating action buttons (FAB) visible on mobile viewport

success_percentage.frontend: 85% - Most features working, quote calculator form has dropdown selection issue

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix quote calculator dropdown selection issue - Vehicle Type and Service Type dropdowns are not properly registering selections, preventing form validation from passing and blocking the core quote estimation functionality. This is a high priority issue as it affects the main user flow.
